apps.name: Rokid Live Studio
apps.summary: Stream your Rokid glasses camera and microphone from your phone.
apps.description: Phone studio app for receiving the Rokid glasses camera and microphone feed, previewing it, and streaming to YouTube or Twitch. It supports stream-key mode, OAuth modes for YouTube/Twitch, and optional chat messages rendered back into the glasses helper overlay.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: Dew Browser
apps.summary: Rokid-first browser with phone mouse mode.
apps.description: Web browser optimized for Rokid glasses. It supports page viewing on glasses and smartphone mouse/keyboard input.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: OverlayRec
apps.summary: Trigger Rokid AR screenshots and AR recording from the glasses.
apps.description: OverlayRec runs on Rokid glasses as an Accessibility Service and opens a small on-glass menu from a two-finger slide combo, letting you start AR Screenshot or AR Record without opening Hi Rokid first.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: Rokid-APKs
apps.summary: Upload and install APKs on Rokid glasses from your phone.
apps.description: Four explicit transfer modes: official CXR-M, Hi Rokid CXR-L, Bluetooth SPP, or Wi-Fi LAN with glasses companion. No desktop helper, no cloud relay.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: Rokid Lyrics
apps.summary: Synced song lyrics from phone to Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Streams synchronized lyrics from an Android phone to the glasses over Bluetooth. Requires the phone and glasses APKs.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: Rokid Shell
apps.summary: File explorer and APK installer for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Native file explorer with APK install flow and local HTTP transfer server for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: EK Arrow
apps.summary: Mini archery game for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: One-button archery game designed for glasses play.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: Dcim Server
apps.summary: Local DCIM browser/server for glasses.
apps.description: EUNG SOFT utility for browsing or serving camera media from Rokid glasses.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: DragonBall Scouter
apps.summary: Dragon Ball inspired scouter HUD.
apps.description: Face lock, pseudo-AR styling and battle-power reveal inspired by Dragon Ball. Built for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: EK Find Price
apps.summary: Camera product price search.
apps.description: Takes a picture, recognizes product text and searches Naver Shopping for prices.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EK Live Cam
apps.summary: Live streaming utility for the glasses camera.
apps.description: Camera streaming utility from EUNG SOFT for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EK Pilot
apps.summary: 3D flight mission game with head-tilt controls.
apps.description: Arcade flight game built for Rokid glasses. Uses glasses-friendly controls and mission-style gameplay.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EK Trans
apps.summary: Offline text translation app.
apps.description: Offline text translation for Rokid glasses using on-device language models after initial setup.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EK Word Up
apps.summary: Hands-free vocabulary trainer.
apps.description: Vocabulary learning app optimized for Rokid glasses with shared study material support.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EKHome
apps.summary: Custom home launcher app for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Alternative launcher/home experience for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: EKReader
apps.summary: E-book reader for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Clean e-book reader built around hands-free and glasses-friendly reading.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: GazeMou
apps.summary: Head-gesture cursor and app drawer utility.
apps.description: RokidAppMaker / GazeMou provides gaze cursor controls, favorites, wake mode and app drawer tools for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: KUPdriveouter

apps.name: GlassesReader
apps.summary: Phone reader bridge that streams text to Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Phone-only companion app for streaming visible reading text to Rokid glasses. It is designed around Chinese reading apps such as WeChat Reading, and can also work with EPUB/readers when their text is exposed to Android accessibility. The UI is Chinese only.
apps.author: conclean

apps.name: hubu
apps.summary: Fitness HUD for BLE workout metrics.
apps.description: Connects to BLE devices such as Garmin watches and displays pace, heart rate and cadence on Rokid glasses.
apps.author: hanabix

apps.name: LC Hot100
apps.summary: Offline LeetCode Hot100 study assistant.
apps.description: Voice-first learning app for studying LeetCode Hot100 on Rokid glasses.
apps.author: bcefghj

apps.name: M365 Rokid HUD
apps.summary: BLE scooter telemetry HUD for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Displays Xiaomi M365 scooter telemetry on Rokid glasses. The phone app handles BLE connectivity and the glasses app renders the HUD.
apps.author: zero2005x

apps.name: Matrix Vision
apps.summary: Matrix-style camera effect app.
apps.description: Transforms the live camera feed into a Matrix-inspired visual filter and can record the effect.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: Memora
apps.summary: Immersive language learning with Rokid glasses HUD and Baidu AI.
apps.description: Four learning modes: scenario dialogue, visual recognition, AI mnemonics, and spaced repetition. Connects to Rokid glasses for HUD overlay and uses Baidu AI for speech and vision.
apps.author: e7naq3y

apps.name: NeuroGlasses
apps.summary: Experimental Rokid AI chat bridge.
apps.description: Experimental phone-side AI bridge for Rokid workflows. Only one release APK is currently published, so RokidBrew treats it as phone-side until the project exposes split artifacts.
apps.author: ECHO-HELLO-WORLD424

apps.name: PhotoDel
apps.summary: View and delete photos or videos on Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Simple utility to browse and delete photos or videos directly on Rokid glasses.
apps.author: osagem

apps.name: Rokid AI Assistant
apps.summary: Open-source AI assistant with separate phone and glasses apps.
apps.description: Voice-controlled assistant for Rokid glasses. The phone app handles AI queries and connectivity while the glasses app provides the wearable interface.
apps.author: zero2005x

apps.name: Rokid Connect HUD
apps.summary: Phone navigation mirrored as a HUD on Rokid glasses.
apps.description: EUNG SOFT navigation HUD. Install the phone companion and the glasses HUD app to mirror supported Korean navigation apps.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: Rokid GMaps
apps.summary: Turn-by-turn navigation for Rokid AR glasses.
apps.description: Phone plus glasses navigation workflow with a HUD for directions. Install both APKs for the full experience.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: Rokid Music Score
apps.summary: Piano score viewer for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Music score viewer packaged as an APK for Rokid RG-glasses.
apps.author: bcefghj

apps.name: Rokid SmartLife
apps.summary: Local life and POI navigation app.
apps.description: Local life, POI and navigation assistant designed for D-pad use on Rokid AI glasses.
apps.author: bcefghj

apps.name: Rokid SSH Terminal
apps.summary: Glasses-native SSH terminal.
apps.description: Developer SSH terminal and tmux control surface for Rokid glasses.
apps.author: bzerk

apps.name: Rokid-Scribe
apps.summary: Capture voice notes on glasses, transcribe on phone, export as TXT or PDF.
apps.description: Record voice notes directly on Rokid glasses. Import them to the phone over Wi-Fi LAN or Bluetooth SPP. Transcribe locally with ElevenLabs, AssemblyAI, Speechmatics, Deepgram, or Groq. Export as TXT or PDF.
apps.author: Anezium

apps.name: TextHome
apps.summary: Text-first home launcher for Rokid glasses.
apps.description: Minimal launcher with wallpaper, clock, weather, battery and text widgets.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT

apps.name: Your Voice
apps.summary: Real-time speech-to-text subtitles for smart glasses.
apps.description: Uses a phone as microphone and sends recognized speech as subtitles to Rokid glasses or another receiver.
apps.author: EUNG SOFT
